summary_text: The Mapper graph contains 44 clusters and 68 connections. It is relatively connected, with 4 isolated clusters. The largest cluster contains 29 document(s), indicating a dominant topic region.
user_summary: This TDA graph contains 44 cluster(s). The graph is fairly connected, suggesting many topics are related or transition into one another. There are 4 isolated cluster(s), and the largest cluster contains 29 document(s), which may represent one of the main topic areas.
